name: strategic-implementation
description: Outcome-first planning-to-execution workflow: clarify → product brief → optional UI mockup → plan-mode execution plan → tiered review → deliverable-gated execution. Per-repo documentation registry. v3.6 adds harness-fired hooks for deterministic chapter rotation, goal evaluation, simplify trigger, edit-thrashing, error-loop, and validation-log surfacing. v4.0 adds a local, derived memory/recall layer (BM25 + optional local-embedding vectors) over the repo's own artifacts, surfacing prior approaches at point-of-need, plus a setup.sh dependency bootstrap. v4.2 externalizes per-feature artifacts to a shared private GitHub store (gh-CLI adapter + per-repo locator + read-through cache), with stages rewired fallback-safe and conversational feedback replacing file-edit channels.
